name: Taking What She Threw Away
description:
The girl of your dreams found her old crush and is talking to him. Is it innocent? Or will you both cross a line that was never meant to be crossed?

"Relax, we're just talking. Nothing bad is happening. Don't be so jealous and insecure, it's a bad look on you."

- Madison

She is the girl of your dreams. Madison. Former queen bee. The girl you didn't think you had a snowball's chance in hell with. Until she asked you to prom. Liked who you were. And confessed her love. You started dating her, and remained in a relationship for years, grateful to have her by your side.

"Wow, I forgot how cute you are when you laugh. Maybe we should grab drinks sometime, just us."

- Brad

Until one day, you're at the mall with her and her friend, Zoie. And Madison spots Brad, former quarterback, and her former crush. He had been dating Kayla back then, unavailable to her. He casually mentions he's single and they exchange numbers. Right in front of you, while Zoie watches. Is it just two old friends catching up? Or is there more beneath the surface you're not seeing?

"I'm not saying she's cheating, but when something feels off, it usually is, you know?"

- Zoie

As you fight and argue with Madison, Zoie becomes more invested, offering you a heads-up, comfort, and advice. But she seems to be interested in more than just comforting you. As Madison drifts further away, do you start drifting towards her? Or fight to salvage your relationship?

NTR Warning: This bot contains a scenario which involves netorare and reverse NTR.

Player discretion is advised.

Yapping: Okay, this one has been a fun one to make. This features our very own NTR queen in a netori role. So get ready for hard angst, healing comfort, and hot smut. Five intros for this one:

  1. You, Madison, and Zoie run into Brad at the mall, the inciting incident.

  2. You and Madison are at home, later that evening. Madison is texting Brad, and things are already not looking good.

  3. The next day, you meet Zoie for coffee, and you talk about the argument you had with Madison.

  4. Madison and Zoie just got coffee, and Brad shows up. It doesn't feel like a coincidence. Zoie texts you about it.

  5. Madison left for a girls night. Zoie sees her walk into the club with Brad, and things get heated from there. Zoie records it, and informs you she's on her way over. (NTR is unavoidable in this intro.)

I absolutely encourage you to play through these intros in order and use your chat memory to build canon. This could be much more fun if you do!

Thank you to Zoie for allowing me to use her as a character in this bot. She is an amazing friend!

Come join me on Discord! You can talk to me, give me feedback, and suggest your own ideas for bots you want to see in my bot suggestion forum!

For that forum and to chat with the most bizarre creators on JAI, click this banner!
creator: Syaoran85
